steps.title: Use the y-intercept input
steps.content:
A $y$-intercept happens where the graph crosses the $y$-axis, so set $x=0$ in the equation.
$$y=9^0$$

steps.title: Evaluate the power
steps.content: Any nonzero base raised to the $0$ power equals $1$. Therefore, the intercept point is $(0,1)$. The answer is C.
